title: Germans Are Not Panicking Over Trump’s Troop Threats
summary_full: Top leaders believe losing 5,000 U.S. troops will not hurt German security. But analysts fear an economic hit, especially in military communities.
summary_public: Top leaders believe losing 5,000 U.S. troops will not hurt German security. But analysts fear an economic hit, especially in military communities.

DE.label: neutral
DE.evidence: fear an economic hit, especially in military communities.
